title: Daily Summary — 2026-04-30
body:
## Recent Activity

Synced window: 2026-04-29T12:08:44Z to 2026-04-30T12:08:44Z. Signals show 27 issues, 22 PRs, 1 discussion, and 0 commits updated.

Activity centered on orchestrator follow-up work, first-run onboarding, daily summary/discussion gating, project-management automation, rubrics cleanup, and stacked PR support.

## Recently Active PRs

- Open: [#60 Collapse old orchestrator handoff comments](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/60), [#61 Support child orchestrator lane handoffs](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/61), and [#62 Add first-run onboarding setup workflow](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/62) were created from orchestrated implementations and remain active.
- Still open from earlier synced work: [#45 Handle closed PR follow-up orchestration](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/45) and [#15 Add minimal add-rubrics route with dedicated workflow](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/15).
- Merged in the window: [#20](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/20), [#36](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/36), [#37](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/37), [#39](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/39), [#41](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/41), [#44](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/44), [#49](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/49), [#50](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/50), [#52](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/52), [#53](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/53), [#54](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/54), [#55](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/55), [#56](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/56), and [#57](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/57).
- Closed without merge in the synced signals: [#7](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/7), [#21](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/21), and [#40](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/40).

## Recently Active Issues

- [#51 Orchestrator to dispatch to another orchestrator](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/51) drove [#61](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/61) and remains open.
- [#59 Nit: In orchestrator mode, collapse previous orchestrate comment when a new one is posted](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/59) drove [#60](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/60) and remains open.
- [#23 Agent should create tags upon install/first run](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/23) drove [#62](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/62) and remains open.
- [#26 Automatically report issues on GitHub](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/26) continued design discussion; latest direction favors GitHub Discussions bug-report intake with promotion to Issues when actionable.
- Closed by merged PRs: [#14](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/14), [#19](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/19), [#28](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/28), [#30](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/30), [#34](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/34), [#38](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/38), [#42](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/42), [#47](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/47), and [#48](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/48).

## Recently Active Discussions

- [#35 Daily Summary — 2026-04-29](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/discussions/35) was present in the synced signals with no recorded comments.

## Follow-ups

1. Review and decide merge/fix paths for open PRs [#60](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/60), [#61](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/61), [#62](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/62), [#45](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/45), and [#15](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/15).
2. Confirm the bug-report Discussions category/intake shape for [#26](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/26).
3. Revisit open orchestrator context questions in [#58](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/58) after evaluating the child-orchestrator implementation in [#61](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/61).

---
*Generated by the agent-daily-summary workflow*

- `pull_request#60` Collapse old orchestrator handoff comments
